trends.headline: Hubble Telescope Captures Stunning New View of Galaxies Colliding

trends.headline: National Park Service announces fee-free days for remainder of summer

trends.headline: Russia to hold Victory Day parade without weaponry display
trends.summary: The scaled back parade comes amid increasing Ukrainian attacks deep into mainland Russia, including the capital Moscow. The last time a Victory Day parade was held without weaponry display was in 2007.
